title: Property Consultant - Aparna Constructions - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Aparna Constructions - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Aparna Constructions has an exciting opening for a Property Consultant at our Jabalpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Aparna Constructions:
Aparna Constructions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aparna Constructions!
